ul.li: Standardized APIs: Consistent interface across all data sources
Real-time Access: Live data rather than cached/stale information
Bidirectional: AI can both read and write (with permissions)
Type Safety: Structured data exchange with validation
Scoped Access: AI only accesses explicitly granted resources
Token Refresh: Automatic handling of expired credentials
Data Residency: Compliance with regional data requirements
Plug-and-Play: Easy to add new data sources
Vendor Agnostic: Works across different AI platforms
Enterprise Ready: Built-in compliance and security features
Scalable: Handles multiple concurrent requests efficiently
